name: local-service-tracker
description: Live availability tracker for local services (bike docks, gyms, libraries, parking, clinics). Pulls real open data + synthetic sources, handles stale/missing data, refreshes on a schedule.
comment: overrides force patched transitive versions of two DEV/BUILD-TIME-only advisories (esbuild dev-server SSRF via drizzle-kit's deprecated loader; postcss CSS-stringify XSS bundled in Next) without downgrading next/drizzle-kit. Do NOT run `npm audit fix --force` — it downgrades next to v9 and breaks the app.
